---
title: "LCM Proteomics Pipeline"
---

Documentation for Millie's Proteomics project. 
This site tracks the processing of LCM samples from initial QC to normalization.

### Pipeline Stages

1. [Initial QC](notebooks/01a_initial_qc_spectronaut.qmd)
2. [DAA marker sense check](notebooks/01b_DAA_marker_check.qmd)
3. [DE plots](notebooks/03_DE_plots.qmd)
4. [GSEA](notebooks/04_gsea.qmd)
